demand_model.formula: log(market_share) = anchored_intercept + price_coefficient * log(effective_price) + capability_coefficient * capability_index
demand_model.note: The published calculator anchors the intercept per selected model so the fitted relationship passes exactly through that model's current share, effective price, and capabilities index.

methodology.arena_comparisons: Arena.ai Text Elo is scraped from the default Text Arena leaderboard. Arena.ai Agent Net Improvement is scraped from the Agent Arena leaderboard's signed overall net-improvement score. Both are evaluated as aggregate benchmark score maps.
methodology.free_models: Free variants are scraped but excluded from the main price-controlled analysis because zero price dominates user choice.
methodology.pairwise_accuracy: Share of model pairs within 2x effective price where the model with the higher benchmark score has higher token usage.
methodology.price_baseline: A log-log regression of total paid usage tokens on effective dollars per million tokens.
methodology.price_measure: Estimated dollars per million served tokens: (prompt tokens * prompt price + completion tokens * completion price + cached tokens * cache-read price) / (prompt + completion + reasoning tokens) * 1e6. Cache-read price falls back to prompt price when unavailable.
methodology.score_after_price: Incremental R^2 from adding benchmark score to a log_usage ~ log_price model.
methodology.score_usage_correlation: Pearson and Spearman correlations between benchmark score and log paid usage for the matched models. Elo and Bradley-Terry benchmarks use their raw leaderboard rating; other dashboard benchmarks use the normalized score.
methodology.usage_measure: OpenRouter paid-model prompt, completion, and reasoning tokens over the selected view, aggregated to dashboard capability model IDs.

pricing_models.capability_model: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview)
pricing_models.model: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview)
